title: Deal Chat
description: Use the deal chat assistant to ask context-aware questions, query the knowledge base, upload call transcripts, save notes, and bind them to touches.

steps.narration: Every deal page includes a persistent chat panel on the right side. Notice there are already a couple of messages from an earlier conversation about this deal.
Expand the chat panel to see the full conversation history. The assistant remembers context from previous exchanges so you can pick up right where you left off.
The prior conversation shows the assistant summarized the deal status when asked. All context stays attached to this deal, so every response is grounded in real data.
Ask a context-aware question about the deal. Here we're asking about key pain points to address in the next meeting with Meridian Dynamics.
The assistant responds with three specific pain points drawn from the deal context: legacy system integration, data silos between teams, and scalability concerns. Each point is actionable.

callout.text: AI responses grounded in deal data

steps.narration: Now let's query the knowledge base. Ask what proposals have been sent to similar companies. The assistant searches across your organization's past work.
The knowledge base response surfaces relevant past proposals and their outcomes. This helps you build on what has worked before rather than starting from scratch.
Upload a call transcript to feed the assistant even more context. Click the upload button to add a recording transcript from your last meeting.
The transcript has been uploaded and parsed. The assistant found twelve key discussion points which are now available as context for future questions and artifact generation.
Save an important insight as a note. Type a summary of the key takeaway and the assistant will store it as a deal note you can reference later.
The note has been saved. Now bind it to a specific touch to connect this insight with your preparation workflow. Select Touch 1 as the target.
The binding confirmation shows the note is now linked to Touch 1. When AtlusDeck generates your next presentation, this insight will be woven into the content automatically.
